publishDecision.summary: OpenAI to cut back on side projects to focus on core business, WSJ reports looks like the stronger lead today.
leadStrengths: The story is still fresh enough for a morning-led publish.
The headline has enough AI-specific signal to support strong downstream content.
leadRisks: NVIDIA Newsroom is not on the trusted-source list, so the lead needs stronger verification.
The story still reads like a broad industry shift, which can lead to vague content if not tightened.
backupStrengths: Reuters is treated as a trusted source for the morning stack.
The story is still fresh enough for a morning-led publish.
The story has multiple AI-specific signals, not just one loose keyword.
backupRisks: The story still reads like a broad industry shift, which can lead to vague content if not tightened.
